title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people preparing for a running race. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: Three young people are preparing for a running race in a park. One girl is tying her trainers while the others are stretching beside her. They are wearing sports clothes and there is a starting line nearby.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows students celebrating at school. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A group of students are celebrating at school after receiving certificates. Two students are holding their certificates and smiling while a teacher is clapping. There are balloons, chairs and a table in the hall.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
